Related Entities

  • hospital MAURY REGIONAL HOSPITAL 3-star overall rating
  • hospital UNITY PSYCHIATRIC CARE-COLUMBIA
  • hospital PINEWOOD SPRINGS
  • snf NHC-MAURY REGIONAL TRANSITIONAL CARE CENTER 5-star, 112 beds
  • snf NHC HEALTHCARE, COLUMBIA 4-star, 106 beds
  • snf LIFE CARE CENTER OF COLUMBIA 4-star, 123 beds
  • snf MT PLEASANT HEALTHCARE AND REHABILITATION 3-star, 72 beds
  • snf MAGNOLIA HEALTHCARE AND REHABILITATION CENTER 1-star, 181 beds
  • snf THE RESERVE AT SPRING HILL 5-star, 68 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
